channel.title: Renovate on jdhao's digital space
channel.description: Recent content in Renovate on jdhao's digital space

item.title: Manage uv.lock file with Renovate
item.description: In our work, we are using renovate to update the dependency packages for Python projects. Previously when we are using good old pip and requirements.txt for package management, renovate works fine since it only needs to update the package version in requirements.txt. We switch to uv this year as our project management tool. Since uv uses pyproject.toml and uv.lock (lockfile) to ensure reproducible project setup, we have an issue that when renovate bot creates a PR for the package updates: it only changes pyproject.toml without updating uv.lock.
